第一层：MiniMax #1 try: MINIMAX_KEY = "sk-cp-gvfuD8aTsLIzQ-wQb16s3022yGQWEN3RNsaIRq0J8LiszIHyee-KEye-ZRisw7kUpGfvMOxve62Q65PCUQoIwaQtNT_TtVkc1WAV9H2juMuzq5J6a_dfO_A" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx1.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#1失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#1") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx1_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx1_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第二层：MiniMax #2 if b64 is None: try: MINIMAX_KEY2 = "sk-cp-OBJYTXCbg4PQS6gO0Col8fT_cEgZY2Ur_6qhB-bWDAqiuFkciSntwIM0U26E-8HrqioqNRbcp8sgdCksRsQTmSoe-PnltkGuNbsE6xxDByKB-Yqr2nNfWNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx2.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY2}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#2失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#2") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx2_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/mx2_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第三层：智谱AI CogView-3 if b64 is None: try: ZHIPU_KEY = "a120ac2e2a824fdc8cb249fddf4dceef.ZRVoP3PHPRszh1Km" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_zp.png" url = "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/images/generations" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "cogview-3", "prompt": prompt_english, "n": 1, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {ZHIPU_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"智谱失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "智谱AI") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_zp_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "3", "-vf", "scale=640:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/zp_{os.path.basename(img_path)}"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第四层：SiliconFlow Qwen if b64 is None: try: SF_KEY = "sk-..." url = "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1/images/generations" pl = {"model": "Tencent/T2I-ImgGen-Wenxin-v1", "prompt": prompt_english, "image_size": {"width": 1024, "height": 576}} data = _json.dumps(pl).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {SF_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"SiliconFlow失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg") _validate_jpeg("/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "SiliconFlow") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_sf_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() _mfile=os.path.expanduser("~/.hermes/cron/output/recent_gen_md5.txt"); _cm=hashlib.md5(open(compressed,"rb").read()).hexdigest(); _recent=set() if os.path.exists(_mfile) and(time.time()-os.path.getmtime(_mfile))<=7*86400: with open(_mfile) as _mf: for _l in _mf: _p=_l.strip().split(","); [None,None] if _p and _p[0]: _recent.add(_p[0]) if _cm in _recent: raise AssertionError(f"SiliconFlow生成的图片MD5={_cm}与近期图片重复，切换至下一层！") with open(_mfile,"a") as _mf: _mf.write(f"{_cm}\n") subprocess.run(["cp",compressed,f"{img_save_dir}/sf__gen_{_cm}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第五层：本地兜底 if b64 is None: LOCAL_IMG_DIR = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/image_cache" USED_FILE = f"{LOCAL_IMG_DIR}/used_today.txt" today = datetime.date.today().isoformat() used_today = set() if os.path.exists(USED_FILE): with open(USED_FILE) as f: for line in f: parts = line.strip().split(',') if parts and parts[0] == today: used_today.add(parts[1]) import random candidates = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] unused = [f for f in candidates if f not in used_today] if not unused: unused = candidates assert unused, "本地兜底图也没有，当前任务中止！" random.shuffle(unused); chosen = unused[0] src = os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, chosen) compressed = "/tmp/_local_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", src, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "兜底压缩失败" _validate_jpeg(compressed, "本地兜底") b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() with open(USED_FILE, "a") as f: f.write(f"{today},{chosen}\n") subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/local_{chosen}"]) assert b64 is not None, "所有图片生成层均失败，当前任务中止！" img_tag = ( f'

' f'' f'

' ) assert '[插图]' in article_html, "HTML中没有[插图]占位符，当前任务中止！" html = article_html.replace('[插图]', img_tag) # 三项验证 assert '[插图' not in html, f"HTML含未替换[插图]，当前任务中止！" b64_imgs = _re.findall(r']+src="data:image/jpeg;base64,([A-Za-z0-9+/=]{5000,})"', html) assert len(b64_imgs) >= 1, "HTML不含有效base64图片，当前任务中止！" for b in b64_imgs: assert len(b) >= 5000, f"base64长度{len(b)}不足5000，图片数据不完整，当前任务中止！" raw_matches = _re.findall(r']*>([^<]*)]*>([^<]*)

', html) bad_inline = [(a, b) for a, b in raw_matches if a.strip() or b.strip()] assert not bad_inline, f"图片内嵌段落，当前任务中止！" # Payload体积校验：总content超过60KB时raise，避免平台存储占位符而非真内容 _total_len = len(html) assert _total_len <= 60000, f"HTML总长度{_total_len}超过60000字节限制，当前任务中止！（需压缩图片或减少字数）" # === 发布API（内嵌，LLM无法绕过） === _API_URL = "https://gw.tanqianku.com/_data_bus/v1/webhook/openclaw" _SECRET = "oc_tqk2026_P9xK$w7" _title_for_api = re.sub(r'[？！？]', '', _h1_m.group(1).strip()) if '_h1_m' in dir() else title _payload = json.dumps({ "title": _title_for_api, "content": final_html, "slug": slug, "category": category }, ensure_ascii=False).encode("utf-8") _ctx = ssl.create_default_context() _req = urllib.request.Request(_API_URL, data=_payload, headers={ "x-openclaw-secret": _SECRET, "Content-Type": "application/json; charset=utf-8" }, method="POST") _resp_data = json.loads(urllib.request.urlopen(_req, timeout=30, context=_ctx).read()) assert _resp_data.get("code") == 200, f"发布API返回错误: {_resp_data}" _article_id = _resp_data.get("data", {}).get("id") print(f"✅ 发布成功，article_id={_article_id}") return {"html": final_html, "article_id": _article_id} # === 调用图片生成+发布函数（内嵌API，LLM不可绕过）=== # === h1标签删除（必须在gen_img调用前执行，防止标题重复）=== _h1_m = re.search(r']*>(.*?)', article_html) assert _h1_m, "无法从HTML提取h1标题，当前任务中止！" _title_text = _h1_m.group(1).strip() _after_h1 = article_html.split('')[1] if '' in article_html else article_html _first_p_m = re.search(r']*>(.*?)

', _after_h1, re.DOTALL) _first_p_text = re.sub(r'<[^>]+>', '', _first_p_m.group(1)).strip() if _first_p_m else '' assert _first_p_text != _title_text, f"标题在正文开头重复：「{_title_text}」，当前任务中止！" # 检查文章第一段是否为标题（标题不得作为正文开头） _after_h1 = article_html.split('')[1] if '' in article_html else article_html _first_p_m = re.search(r']*>(.*?)

', _after_h1, re.DOTALL) _first_p_text = re.sub(r'<[^>]+>', '', _first_p_m.group(1)).strip() if _first_p_m else '' assert _first_p_text != _title_text, f"标题在正文开头重复：「{_title_text}」，当前任务中止！" article_html = re.sub(r']*>.*?\s*', '', article_html, flags=re.DOTALL) article_html = re.sub(r'```html[\s\S]*?```', '', article_html) article_html = re.sub(r'```[\s\S]*?```', '', article_html) assert '```' not in article_html, "清理后仍含代码围栏，当前任务中止！" _gen_result = gen_img_and_build_html(img_prompt_english, article_html, img_save_dir) # 解析返回值 assert isinstance(_gen_result, dict) and "html" in _gen_result, "gen_img_and_build_html未返回dict，函数可能被篡改！当前任务中止！" final_html = _gen_result["html"] article_id = _gen_result.get("article_id") assert article_id is not None, "article_id为None，发布失败！当前任务中止！" assert len(final_html) >= 20000, f"HTML长度{{len(final_html)}}<20000（图片未嵌入），当前任务中止！" , f"HTML长度{{len(final_html)}}<20000（图片未嵌入），当前任务中止！"

jobs.name: 探路-电商运营实战-下午
jobs.prompt:
## 任务：探路（tanlu）文章发布 — 招商/展会/活动/营销 ### 类目：探路（slug=tanlu, category="探路"） ### 内容方向：纺织电商选品策略、流量获取方法、私域运营、私域转化、直播带货、爆款打造、复购率提升、DSR动态评分维护 ### 写作前查重（必做） 先读 `~/.hermes/cron/output/recent_articles.json`，若计划写的话题含文件中7天内的已发关键词，立即换角度。禁止重复发布同一话题。 重要：除了标题关键词，还需检查文章大意是否重复。例如：原料写了"涤纶涨价"，布行再写"涤纶价格走势"就算重复，必须换角度。跨类目语义重复同样禁止。 重要：除了标题关键词，还需检查文章大意是否重复。例如：原料写了"涤纶涨价"，布行再写"涤纶价格走势"就算重复，必须换角度。跨类目语义重复同样禁止。 【内容合规检查 - 提交前必须执行】 1. 标题不得作为正文第一段（标题是标题，第一段必须是引言/背景） 2. 文章第一段与标题完全相同 → 必须重写第一段 3. 违禁词检查：天猫/京东/拼多多/抖音/淘宝/阿里巴巴/亚马逊 → 替换为"电商平台" ### 写作素材： 1. 当日trend文件：`~/.hermes/cron/output/textile_trend_YYYYMMDD.md` - 从trend文件中筛选所有与"招商加盟"、"展会论坛"、"活动峰会"、"营销推广"相关的内容 - 只采集36小时内发生的最新活动资讯 2. 背景知识：`~/.hermes/cache/documents/`下相关行业文件 ### 已发布话题（全系统查重 - 必做） 执行前先读取 `~/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics/GLOBAL_TOPICS.txt`，如果文件中已存在本次计划写的话题（精确匹配），则本篇必须换话题，禁止重复发布。同一话题在全系统只允许发布一次。 ### 写作后记录话题（全系统生效）： 文章发布成功后，立即将本次选用的话题追加写入 `~/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics/GLOBAL_TOPICS.txt`（一行一个，禁止覆盖旧记录）。 # === 主题追踪文件更新（每次发布成功后必须执行）=== with open(GLOBAL_FILE, 'a', encoding='utf-8') as f: f.write(chosen_topic.strip() + '\n') # === 文章正文写作规则（生成前必须遵守，绝对禁止）=== # ■ 标题字段只放标题，标题不进入正文 # ■ 正文（body）第一句必须是具体开场白：场景/数据/问题/引言 # ■ 绝对禁止正文第一句是以下句式： # - "XXX是一种/XXX是指/XXX指得是/XXX表示"（下定义句式） # - "XXX是XXX的核心/关键/基础"（判断句式） # - 标题的重复、变体、简化或释义 # ■ 正确开场示例（每次必须选一种）： # 场景式："广东一家中型内衣厂最近把主面料从纯棉换成了Modal..."（要有具体工厂/地点） # 数据式："2025年一季度，瑜伽内衣类目增速同比达34%。"（要有具体数字） # 问题式："选错一款面料，交期延误一个月，经销商直接取消订单。"（要有具体后果） # 引言式："说起再生纤维素纤维，很多采购第一时间想到粘胶。"（有明确指向） # ■ H2章节标题格式：必须用"一、二、三"，绝对禁止"第一章/第二章/第三章" # ■ 正文禁止套话废话：每段必须有具体信息（工厂名/具体数字/案例细节/操作步骤） # ■ 禁止"作为XXX，了解/掌握XXX，对于XXX至关重要/意义重大"类套话 article_html = "你的HTML内容（含[插图]占位符）" def gen_img_and_build_html(img_prompt_english: str, article_html: str, img_save_dir: str) -> dict: """图片生成与发布整合函数：生成图片→嵌入HTML→发布API→返回结构化结果""" # === 章节结构进化约束 === # 不得固定为4章，具体章数由内容深度决定： # - 规格解读/工艺揭秘型：建议4章 # - 避坑/认证合规型：建议3章 # - 行情分析/趋势预判型：建议5章 # 发布前验证 h2数量在3-5之间 os.makedirs(img_save_dir, exist_ok=True) b64 = None def _validate_jpeg(path: str, label: str) -> None: """下载后立即验证：文件>=10KB 且 JPEG 头为 FF D8 FF。失败则 raise 触发兜底。""" size = os.path.getsize(path) assert size >= 10000, f"{label}下载后{size}字节<10KB（错误页面/截断），当前任务中止！" with open(path, "rb") as f: header = f.read(3) assert header == b"\xff\xd8\xff", f"{label}文件头={header.hex()}不是JPEG，当前任务中止！" # 第一层：MiniMax #1 try: MINIMAX_KEY = "sk-cp-gvfuD8aTsLIzQ-wQb16s3022yGQWEN3RNsaIRq0J8LiszIHyee-KEye-ZRisw7kUpGfvMOxve62Q65PCUQoIwaQtNT_TtVkc1WAV9H2juMuzq5J6a_dfO_A" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx1.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#1失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#1") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx1_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _compressed_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _compressed_size >= 30000, f"MiniMax#1压缩后{_compressed_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"MiniMax#1 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" _mfile=os.path.expanduser("~/.hermes/cron/output/recent_gen_md5.txt"); _cm=hashlib.md5(open(compressed,"rb").read()).hexdigest(); _recent=set() if os.path.exists(_mfile) and(time.time()-os.path.getmtime(_mfile))<=7*86400: with open(_mfile) as _mf: for _l in _mf: _p=_l.strip().split(","); [None,None] if _p and _p[0]: _recent.add(_p[0]) if _cm in _recent: raise AssertionError(f"MiniMax#1生成的图片MD5={_cm}与近期图片重复，切换至下一层！") with open(_mfile,"a") as _mf: _mf.write(f"{_cm}\n") subprocess.run(["cp",compressed,f"{img_save_dir}/mx1__gen_{_cm}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第二层：MiniMax #2 if b64 is None: try: MINIMAX_KEY2 = "sk-cp-OBJYTXCbg4PQS6gO0Col8fT_cEgZY2Ur_6qhB-bWDAqiuFkciSntwIM0U26E-8HrqioqNRbcp8sgdCksRsQTmSoe-PnltkGuNbsE6xxDByKB-Yqr2nNfWNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx2.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY2}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#2失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#2") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx2_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _mx2_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _mx2_comp_size >= 30000, f"MiniMax#2压缩后{_mx2_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"MiniMax#2 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" _mfile=os.path.expanduser("~/.hermes/cron/output/recent_gen_md5.txt"); _cm=hashlib.md5(open(compressed,"rb").read()).hexdigest(); _recent=set() if os.path.exists(_mfile) and(time.time()-os.path.getmtime(_mfile))<=7*86400: with open(_mfile) as _mf: for _l in _mf: _p=_l.strip().split(","); [None,None] if _p and _p[0]: _recent.add(_p[0]) if _cm in _recent: raise AssertionError(f"MiniMax#2生成的图片MD5={_cm}与近期图片重复，切换至下一层！") with open(_mfile,"a") as _mf: _mf.write(f"{_cm}\n") subprocess.run(["cp",compressed,f"{img_save_dir}/mx2__gen_{_cm}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第三层：智谱AI CogView-3 if b64 is None: try: ZHIPU_KEY = "a120ac2e2a824fdc8cb249fddf4dceef.ZRVoP3PHPRszh1Km" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_zp.png" url = "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/images/generations" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "cogview-3", "prompt": prompt_english, "n": 1, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {ZHIPU_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"智谱失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "智谱AI") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_zp_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "3", "-vf", "scale=640:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _zp_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _zp_comp_size >= 30000, f"智谱AI压缩后{_zp_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"智谱AI base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" _mfile=os.path.expanduser("~/.hermes/cron/output/recent_gen_md5.txt"); _cm=hashlib.md5(open(compressed,"rb").read()).hexdigest(); _recent=set() if os.path.exists(_mfile) and(time.time()-os.path.getmtime(_mfile))<=7*86400: with open(_mfile) as _mf: for _l in _mf: _p=_l.strip().split(","); [None,None] if _p and _p[0]: _recent.add(_p[0]) if _cm in _recent: raise AssertionError(f"智谱AI生成的图片MD5={_cm}与近期图片重复，切换至下一层！") with open(_mfile,"a") as _mf: _mf.write(f"{_cm}\n") subprocess.run(["cp",compressed,f"{img_save_dir}/zp__gen_{_cm}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第四层：SiliconFlow Qwen if b64 is None: try: SF_KEY = "sk-..." url = "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1/images/generations" pl = {"model": "Tencent/T2I-ImgGen-Wenxin-v1", "prompt": prompt_english, "image_size": {"width": 1024, "height": 576}} data = _json.dumps(pl).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {SF_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"SiliconFlow失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg") _validate_jpeg("/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "SiliconFlow") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_sf_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _sf_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _sf_comp_size >= 30000, f"SiliconFlow压缩后{_sf_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"SiliconFlow base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" _mfile=os.path.expanduser("~/.hermes/cron/output/recent_gen_md5.txt"); _cm=hashlib.md5(open(compressed,"rb").read()).hexdigest(); _recent=set() if os.path.exists(_mfile) and(time.time()-os.path.getmtime(_mfile))<=7*86400: with open(_mfile) as _mf: for _l in _mf: _p=_l.strip().split(","); [None,None] if _p and _p[0]: _recent.add(_p[0]) if _cm in _recent: raise AssertionError(f"SiliconFlow生成的图片MD5={_cm}与近期图片重复，切换至下一层！") with open(_mfile,"a") as _mf: _mf.write(f"{_cm}\n") subprocess.run(["cp",compressed,f"{img_save_dir}/sf__gen_{_cm}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第五层：本地兜底 if b64 is None: LOCAL_IMG_DIR = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/image_cache" USED_FILE = f"{LOCAL_IMG_DIR}/used_today.txt" today = datetime.date.today().isoformat() used_today = set() if os.path.exists(USED_FILE): with open(USED_FILE) as f: for line in f: parts = line.strip().split(',') if parts and parts[0] == today: used_today.add(parts[1]) import random candidates = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] unused = [f for f in candidates if f not in used_today] if not unused: unused = candidates assert unused, "本地兜底图也没有，当前任务中止！" random.shuffle(unused); chosen = unused[0] src = os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, chosen) compressed = "/tmp/_local_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", src, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "兜底压缩失败" _validate_jpeg(compressed, "本地兜底") _local_compressed_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _local_compressed_size >= 30000, f"本地兜底压缩后{_local_compressed_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"本地兜底 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" with open(USED_FILE, "a") as f: f.write(f"{today},{chosen}\n") subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/local_{chosen}"]) assert b64 is not None, "所有图片生成层均失败，当前任务中止！" img_tag = ( f'

' f'' f'

' ) assert '[插图]' in article_html, "HTML中没有[插图]占位符，当前任务中止！" html = article_html.replace('[插图]', img_tag) # 端到端验证：从最终HTML再次提取base64并确认长度（防止嵌入时损坏） _html_b64_match = _re.search(r']+src="data:image/jpeg;base64,([A-Za-z0-9+/=]{5000,})"', html) assert _html_b64_match, "HTML不含有效base64图片（提取失败），当前任务中止！" _html_b64_len = len(_html_b64_match.group(1)) assert _html_b64_len >= 30000, f"HTML提取base64长度{_html_b64_len}<30000（嵌入损坏），当前任务中止！" # 三项验证 assert '[插图' not in html, f"HTML含未替换[插图]，当前任务中止！" b64_imgs = _re.findall(r']+src="data:image/jpeg;base64,([A-Za-z0-9+/=]{5000,})"', html) assert len(b64_imgs) >= 1, "HTML不含有效base64图片，当前任务中止！" for b in b64_imgs: assert len(b) >= 5000, f"base64长度{len(b)}不足5000，图片数据不完整，当前任务中止！" raw_matches = _re.findall(r']*>([^<]*)]*>([^<]*)

', html) bad_inline = [(a, b) for a, b in raw_matches if a.strip() or b.strip()] assert not bad_inline, f"图片内嵌段落，当前任务中止！" # Payload体积校验：总content超过60KB时raise，避免平台存储占位符而非真内容 _total_len = len(html) assert _total_len <= 60000, f"HTML总长度{_total_len}超过60000字节限制，当前任务中止！（需压缩图片或减少字数）" # === 发布API（内嵌，LLM无法绕过） === _API_URL = "https://gw.tanqianku.com/_data_bus/v1/webhook/openclaw" _SECRET = "oc_tqk2026_P9xK$w7" _title_for_api = re.sub(r'[？！？]', '', _h1_m.group(1).strip()) if '_h1_m' in dir() else title _payload = json.dumps({ "title": _title_for_api, "content": final_html, "slug": slug, "category": category }, ensure_ascii=False).encode("utf-8") _ctx = ssl.create_default_context() _req = urllib.request.Request(_API_URL, data=_payload, headers={ "x-openclaw-secret": _SECRET, "Content-Type": "application/json; charset=utf-8" }, method="POST") _resp_data = json.loads(urllib.request.urlopen(_req, timeout=30, context=_ctx).read()) assert _resp_data.get("code") == 200, f"发布API返回错误: {_resp_data}" _article_id = _resp_data.get("data", {}).get("id") print(f"✅ 发布成功，article_id={_article_id}") return {"html": final_html, "article_id": _article_id} # === 调用图片生成+发布函数（内嵌API，LLM不可绕过）=== # === h1标签删除（必须在gen_img调用前执行，防止标题重复）=== _h1_m = re.search(r']*>(.*?)', article_html) assert _h1_m, "无法从HTML提取h1标题，当前任务中止！" _title_text = _h1_m.group(1).strip() _after_h1 = article_html.split('')[1] if '' in article_html else article_html _first_p_m = re.search(r']*>(.*?)

', _after_h1, re.DOTALL) _first_p_text = re.sub(r'<[^>]+>', '', _first_p_m.group(1)).strip() if _first_p_m else '' assert _first_p_text != _title_text, f"标题在正文开头重复：「{_title_text}」，当前任务中止！" # 检查文章第一段是否为标题（标题不得作为正文开头） _after_h1 = article_html.split('')[1] if '' in article_html else article_html _first_p_m = re.search(r']*>(.*?)

', _after_h1, re.DOTALL) _first_p_text = re.sub(r'<[^>]+>', '', _first_p_m.group(1)).strip() if _first_p_m else '' assert _first_p_text != _title_text, f"标题在正文开头重复：「{_title_text}」，当前任务中止！" article_html = re.sub(r']*>.*?\s*', '', article_html, flags=re.DOTALL) article_html = re.sub(r'```html[\s\S]*?```', '', article_html) article_html = re.sub(r'```[\s\S]*?```', '', article_html) assert '```' not in article_html, "清理后仍含代码围栏，当前任务中止！" _gen_result = gen_img_and_build_html(img_prompt_english, article_html, img_save_dir) # 解析返回值 assert isinstance(_gen_result, dict) and "html" in _gen_result, "gen_img_and_build_html未返回dict，函数可能被篡改！当前任务中止！" final_html = _gen_result["html"] article_id = _gen_result.get("article_id") assert article_id is not None, "article_id为None，发布失败！当前任务中止！" assert len(final_html) >= 20000, f"HTML长度{{len(final_html)}}<20000（图片未嵌入），当前任务中止！" , f"HTML长度{{len(final_html)}}<20000（图片未嵌入），当前任务中止！"

jobs.name: 探路-跨境出海动态-上午
jobs.prompt:
## 任务：探路（tanlu）文章发布 — 招商/展会/活动/营销 ### 类目：探路（slug=tanlu, category="探路"） ### 内容方向：纺织跨境平台动态、海外市场机遇、国际认证要求、海外仓与物流方案、外贸订单动态、汇率风险管理 ### 写作前查重（必做） 先读 `~/.hermes/cron/output/recent_articles.json`，若计划写的话题含文件中7天内的已发关键词，立即换角度。禁止重复发布同一话题。 重要：除了标题关键词，还需检查文章大意是否重复。例如：原料写了"涤纶涨价"，布行再写"涤纶价格走势"就算重复，必须换角度。跨类目语义重复同样禁止。 重要：除了标题关键词，还需检查文章大意是否重复。例如：原料写了"涤纶涨价"，布行再写"涤纶价格走势"就算重复，必须换角度。跨类目语义重复同样禁止。 【内容合规检查 - 提交前必须执行】 1. 标题不得作为正文第一段（标题是标题，第一段必须是引言/背景） 2. 文章第一段与标题完全相同 → 必须重写第一段 3. 违禁词检查：天猫/京东/拼多多/抖音/淘宝/阿里巴巴/亚马逊 → 替换为"电商平台" ### 写作素材： 1. 当日trend文件：`~/.hermes/cron/output/textile_trend_YYYYMMDD.md` - 从trend文件中筛选所有与"招商加盟"、"展会论坛"、"活动峰会"、"营销推广"相关的内容 - 只采集36小时内发生的最新活动资讯 2. 背景知识：`~/.hermes/cache/documents/`下相关行业文件 ### 已发布话题（全系统查重 - 必做） 执行前先读取 `~/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics/GLOBAL_TOPICS.txt`，如果文件中已存在本次计划写的话题（精确匹配），则本篇必须换话题，禁止重复发布。同一话题在全系统只允许发布一次。 ### 写作后记录话题（全系统生效）： 文章发布成功后，立即将本次选用的话题追加写入 `~/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics/GLOBAL_TOPICS.txt`（一行一个，禁止覆盖旧记录）。 # === 主题追踪文件更新（每次发布成功后必须执行）=== with open(GLOBAL_FILE, 'a', encoding='utf-8') as f: f.write(chosen_topic.strip() + '\n') # === 文章正文写作规则（生成前必须遵守，绝对禁止）=== # ■ 标题字段只放标题，标题不进入正文 # ■ 正文（body）第一句必须是具体开场白：场景/数据/问题/引言 # ■ 绝对禁止正文第一句是以下句式： # - "XXX是一种/XXX是指/XXX指得是/XXX表示"（下定义句式） # - "XXX是XXX的核心/关键/基础"（判断句式） # - 标题的重复、变体、简化或释义 # ■ 正确开场示例（每次必须选一种）： # 场景式："广东一家中型内衣厂最近把主面料从纯棉换成了Modal..."（要有具体工厂/地点） # 数据式："2025年一季度，瑜伽内衣类目增速同比达34%。"（要有具体数字） # 问题式："选错一款面料，交期延误一个月，经销商直接取消订单。"（要有具体后果） # 引言式："说起再生纤维素纤维，很多采购第一时间想到粘胶。"（有明确指向） # ■ H2章节标题格式：必须用"一、二、三"，绝对禁止"第一章/第二章/第三章" # ■ 正文禁止套话废话：每段必须有具体信息（工厂名/具体数字/案例细节/操作步骤） # ■ 禁止"作为XXX，了解/掌握XXX，对于XXX至关重要/意义重大"类套话 article_html = "你的HTML内容（含[插图]占位符）" def gen_img_and_build_html(img_prompt_english: str, article_html: str, img_save_dir: str) -> dict: """图片生成与发布整合函数：生成图片→嵌入HTML→发布API→返回结构化结果""" # === 章节结构进化约束 === # 不得固定为4章，具体章数由内容深度决定： # - 规格解读/工艺揭秘型：建议4章 # - 避坑/认证合规型：建议3章 # - 行情分析/趋势预判型：建议5章 # 发布前验证 h2数量在3-5之间 os.makedirs(img_save_dir, exist_ok=True) b64 = None def _validate_jpeg(path: str, label: str) -> None: """下载后立即验证：文件>=10KB 且 JPEG 头为 FF D8 FF。失败则 raise 触发兜底。""" size = os.path.getsize(path) assert size >= 10000, f"{label}下载后{size}字节<10KB（错误页面/截断），当前任务中止！" with open(path, "rb") as f: header = f.read(3) assert header == b"\xff\xd8\xff", f"{label}文件头={header.hex()}不是JPEG，当前任务中止！" # 第一层：MiniMax #1 try: MINIMAX_KEY = "sk-cp-gvfuD8aTsLIzQ-wQb16s3022yGQWEN3RNsaIRq0J8LiszIHyee-KEye-ZRisw7kUpGfvMOxve62Q65PCUQoIwaQtNT_TtVkc1WAV9H2juMuzq5J6a_dfO_A" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx1.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#1失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#1") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx1_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _compressed_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _compressed_size >= 30000, f"MiniMax#1压缩后{_compressed_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"MiniMax#1 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" _mfile=os.path.expanduser("~/.hermes/cron/output/recent_gen_md5.txt"); _cm=hashlib.md5(open(compressed,"rb").read()).hexdigest(); _recent=set() if os.path.exists(_mfile) and(time.time()-os.path.getmtime(_mfile))<=7*86400: with open(_mfile) as _mf: for _l in _mf: _p=_l.strip().split(","); [None,None] if _p and _p[0]: _recent.add(_p[0]) if _cm in _recent: raise AssertionError(f"MiniMax#1生成的图片MD5={_cm}与近期图片重复，切换至下一层！") with open(_mfile,"a") as _mf: _mf.write(f"{_cm}\n") subprocess.run(["cp",compressed,f"{img_save_dir}/mx1__gen_{_cm}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第二层：MiniMax #2 if b64 is None: try: MINIMAX_KEY2 = "sk-cp-OBJYTXCbg4PQS6gO0Col8fT_cEgZY2Ur_6qhB-bWDAqiuFkciSntwIM0U26E-8HrqioqNRbcp8sgdCksRsQTmSoe-PnltkGuNbsE6xxDByKB-Yqr2nNfWNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx2.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY2}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#2失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#2") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx2_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _mx2_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _mx2_comp_size >= 30000, f"MiniMax#2压缩后{_mx2_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"MiniMax#2 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" _mfile=os.path.expanduser("~/.hermes/cron/output/recent_gen_md5.txt"); _cm=hashlib.md5(open(compressed,"rb").read()).hexdigest(); _recent=set() if os.path.exists(_mfile) and(time.time()-os.path.getmtime(_mfile))<=7*86400: with open(_mfile) as _mf: for _l in _mf: _p=_l.strip().split(","); [None,None] if _p and _p[0]: _recent.add(_p[0]) if _cm in _recent: raise AssertionError(f"MiniMax#2生成的图片MD5={_cm}与近期图片重复，切换至下一层！") with open(_mfile,"a") as _mf: _mf.write(f"{_cm}\n") subprocess.run(["cp",compressed,f"{img_save_dir}/mx2__gen_{_cm}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第三层：智谱AI CogView-3 if b64 is None: try: ZHIPU_KEY = "a120ac2e2a824fdc8cb249fddf4dceef.ZRVoP3PHPRszh1Km" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_zp.png" url = "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/images/generations" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "cogview-3", "prompt": prompt_english, "n": 1, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {ZHIPU_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"智谱失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "智谱AI") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_zp_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "3", "-vf", "scale=640:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _zp_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _zp_comp_size >= 30000, f"智谱AI压缩后{_zp_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"智谱AI base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" _mfile=os.path.expanduser("~/.hermes/cron/output/recent_gen_md5.txt"); _cm=hashlib.md5(open(compressed,"rb").read()).hexdigest(); _recent=set() if os.path.exists(_mfile) and(time.time()-os.path.getmtime(_mfile))<=7*86400: with open(_mfile) as _mf: for _l in _mf: _p=_l.strip().split(","); [None,None] if _p and _p[0]: _recent.add(_p[0]) if _cm in _recent: raise AssertionError(f"智谱AI生成的图片MD5={_cm}与近期图片重复，切换至下一层！") with open(_mfile,"a") as _mf: _mf.write(f"{_cm}\n") subprocess.run(["cp",compressed,f"{img_save_dir}/zp__gen_{_cm}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第四层：SiliconFlow Qwen if b64 is None: try: SF_KEY = "sk-..." url = "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1/images/generations" pl = {"model": "Tencent/T2I-ImgGen-Wenxin-v1", "prompt": prompt_english, "image_size": {"width": 1024, "height": 576}} data = _json.dumps(pl).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {SF_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"SiliconFlow失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg") _validate_jpeg("/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "SiliconFlow") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_sf_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _sf_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _sf_comp_size >= 30000, f"SiliconFlow压缩后{_sf_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"SiliconFlow base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" _mfile=os.path.expanduser("~/.hermes/cron/output/recent_gen_md5.txt"); _cm=hashlib.md5(open(compressed,"rb").read()).hexdigest(); _recent=set() if os.path.exists(_mfile) and(time.time()-os.path.getmtime(_mfile))<=7*86400: with open(_mfile) as _mf: for _l in _mf: _p=_l.strip().split(","); [None,None] if _p and _p[0]: _recent.add(_p[0]) if _cm in _recent: raise AssertionError(f"SiliconFlow生成的图片MD5={_cm}与近期图片重复，切换至下一层！") with open(_mfile,"a") as _mf: _mf.write(f"{_cm}\n") subprocess.run(["cp",compressed,f"{img_save_dir}/sf__gen_{_cm}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第五层：本地兜底 if b64 is None: LOCAL_IMG_DIR = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/image_cache" USED_FILE = f"{LOCAL_IMG_DIR}/used_today.txt" today = datetime.date.today().isoformat() used_today = set() if os.path.exists(USED_FILE): with open(USED_FILE) as f: for line in f: parts = line.strip().split(',') if parts and parts[0] == today: used_today.add(parts[1]) import random candidates = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] unused = [f for f in candidates if f not in used_today] if not unused: unused = candidates assert unused, "本地兜底图也没有，当前任务中止！" random.shuffle(unused); chosen = unused[0] src = os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, chosen) compressed = "/tmp/_local_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", src, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "兜底压缩失败" _validate_jpeg(compressed, "本地兜底") _local_compressed_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _local_compressed_size >= 30000, f"本地兜底压缩后{_local_compressed_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"本地兜底 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" with open(USED_FILE, "a") as f: f.write(f"{today},{chosen}\n") subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/local_{chosen}"]) assert b64 is not None, "所有图片生成层均失败，当前任务中止！" img_tag = ( f'

' f'' f'

' ) assert '[插图]' in article_html, "HTML中没有[插图]占位符，当前任务中止！" html = article_html.replace('[插图]', img_tag) # 端到端验证：从最终HTML再次提取base64并确认长度（防止嵌入时损坏） _html_b64_match = _re.search(r']+src="data:image/jpeg;base64,([A-Za-z0-9+/=]{5000,})"', html) assert _html_b64_match, "HTML不含有效base64图片（提取失败），当前任务中止！" _html_b64_len = len(_html_b64_match.group(1)) assert _html_b64_len >= 30000, f"HTML提取base64长度{_html_b64_len}<30000（嵌入损坏），当前任务中止！" # 三项验证 assert '[插图' not in html, f"HTML含未替换[插图]，当前任务中止！" b64_imgs = _re.findall(r']+src="data:image/jpeg;base64,([A-Za-z0-9+/=]{5000,})"', html) assert len(b64_imgs) >= 1, "HTML不含有效base64图片，当前任务中止！" for b in b64_imgs: assert len(b) >= 5000, f"base64长度{len(b)}不足5000，图片数据不完整，当前任务中止！" raw_matches = _re.findall(r']*>([^<]*)]*>([^<]*)

', html) bad_inline = [(a, b) for a, b in raw_matches if a.strip() or b.strip()] assert not bad_inline, f"图片内嵌段落，当前任务中止！" # Payload体积校验：总content超过60KB时raise，避免平台存储占位符而非真内容 _total_len = len(html) assert _total_len <= 60000, f"HTML总长度{_total_len}超过60000字节限制，当前任务中止！（需压缩图片或减少字数）" # === 发布API（内嵌，LLM无法绕过） === _API_URL = "https://gw.tanqianku.com/_data_bus/v1/webhook/openclaw" _SECRET = "oc_tqk2026_P9xK$w7" _title_for_api = re.sub(r'[？！？]', '', _h1_m.group(1).strip()) if '_h1_m' in dir() else title _payload = json.dumps({ "title": _title_for_api, "content": final_html, "slug": slug, "category": category }, ensure_ascii=False).encode("utf-8") _ctx = ssl.create_default_context() _req = urllib.request.Request(_API_URL, data=_payload, headers={ "x-openclaw-secret": _SECRET, "Content-Type": "application/json; charset=utf-8" }, method="POST") _resp_data = json.loads(urllib.request.urlopen(_req, timeout=30, context=_ctx).read()) assert _resp_data.get("code") == 200, f"发布API返回错误: {_resp_data}" _article_id = _resp_data.get("data", {}).get("id") print(f"✅ 发布成功，article_id={_article_id}") return {"html": final_html, "article_id": _article_id} # === 调用图片生成+发布函数（内嵌API，LLM不可绕过）=== # === h1标签删除（必须在gen_img调用前执行，防止标题重复）=== _h1_m = re.search(r']*>(.*?)', article_html) assert _h1_m, "无法从HTML提取h1标题，当前任务中止！" _title_text = _h1_m.group(1).strip() _after_h1 = article_html.split('')[1] if '' in article_html else article_html _first_p_m = re.search(r']*>(.*?)

', _after_h1, re.DOTALL) _first_p_text = re.sub(r'<[^>]+>', '', _first_p_m.group(1)).strip() if _first_p_m else '' assert _first_p_text != _title_text, f"标题在正文开头重复：「{_title_text}」，当前任务中止！" # 检查文章第一段是否为标题（标题不得作为正文开头） _after_h1 = article_html.split('')[1] if '' in article_html else article_html _first_p_m = re.search(r']*>(.*?)

', _after_h1, re.DOTALL) _first_p_text = re.sub(r'<[^>]+>', '', _first_p_m.group(1)).strip() if _first_p_m else '' assert _first_p_text != _title_text, f"标题在正文开头重复：「{_title_text}」，当前任务中止！" article_html = re.sub(r']*>.*?\s*', '', article_html, flags=re.DOTALL) article_html = re.sub(r'```html[\s\S]*?```', '', article_html) article_html = re.sub(r'```[\s\S]*?```', '', article_html) assert '```' not in article_html, "清理后仍含代码围栏，当前任务中止！" _gen_result = gen_img_and_build_html(img_prompt_english, article_html, img_save_dir) # 解析返回值 assert isinstance(_gen_result, dict) and "html" in _gen_result, "gen_img_and_build_html未返回dict，函数可能被篡改！当前任务中止！" final_html = _gen_result["html"] article_id = _gen_result.get("article_id") assert article_id is not None, "article_id为None，发布失败！当前任务中止！" assert len(final_html) >= 20000, f"HTML长度{{len(final_html)}}<20000（图片未嵌入），当前任务中止！" , f"HTML长度{{len(final_html)}}<20000（图片未嵌入），当前任务中止！"

jobs.name: 探路-跨境出海动态-下午
jobs.prompt:
## 任务：探路（tanlu）文章发布 — 招商/展会/活动/营销 ### 类目：探路（slug=tanlu, category="探路"） ### 内容方向：纺织跨境平台动态、海外市场机遇、国际认证要求、海外仓与物流方案、外贸订单动态、汇率风险管理 ### 写作前查重（必做） 先读 `~/.hermes/cron/output/recent_articles.json`，若计划写的话题含文件中7天内的已发关键词，立即换角度。禁止重复发布同一话题。 重要：除了标题关键词，还需检查文章大意是否重复。例如：原料写了"涤纶涨价"，布行再写"涤纶价格走势"就算重复，必须换角度。跨类目语义重复同样禁止。 重要：除了标题关键词，还需检查文章大意是否重复。例如：原料写了"涤纶涨价"，布行再写"涤纶价格走势"就算重复，必须换角度。跨类目语义重复同样禁止。 【内容合规检查 - 提交前必须执行】 1. 标题不得作为正文第一段（标题是标题，第一段必须是引言/背景） 2. 文章第一段与标题完全相同 → 必须重写第一段 3. 违禁词检查：天猫/京东/拼多多/抖音/淘宝/阿里巴巴/亚马逊 → 替换为"电商平台" ### 写作素材： 1. 当日trend文件：`~/.hermes/cron/output/textile_trend_YYYYMMDD.md` - 从trend文件中筛选所有与"招商加盟"、"展会论坛"、"活动峰会"、"营销推广"相关的内容 - 只采集36小时内发生的最新活动资讯 2. 背景知识：`~/.hermes/cache/documents/`下相关行业文件 ### 已发布话题（全系统查重 - 必做） 执行前先读取 `~/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics/GLOBAL_TOPICS.txt`，如果文件中已存在本次计划写的话题（精确匹配），则本篇必须换话题，禁止重复发布。同一话题在全系统只允许发布一次。 ### 写作后记录话题（全系统生效）： 文章发布成功后，立即将本次选用的话题追加写入 `~/.hermes/cron/output/last_topics/GLOBAL_TOPICS.txt`（一行一个，禁止覆盖旧记录）。 # === 主题追踪文件更新（每次发布成功后必须执行）=== with open(GLOBAL_FILE, 'a', encoding='utf-8') as f: f.write(chosen_topic.strip() + '\n') # === 文章正文写作规则（生成前必须遵守，绝对禁止）=== # ■ 标题字段只放标题，标题不进入正文 # ■ 正文（body）第一句必须是具体开场白：场景/数据/问题/引言 # ■ 绝对禁止正文第一句是以下句式： # - "XXX是一种/XXX是指/XXX指得是/XXX表示"（下定义句式） # - "XXX是XXX的核心/关键/基础"（判断句式） # - 标题的重复、变体、简化或释义 # ■ 正确开场示例（每次必须选一种）： # 场景式："广东一家中型内衣厂最近把主面料从纯棉换成了Modal..."（要有具体工厂/地点） # 数据式："2025年一季度，瑜伽内衣类目增速同比达34%。"（要有具体数字） # 问题式："选错一款面料，交期延误一个月，经销商直接取消订单。"（要有具体后果） # 引言式："说起再生纤维素纤维，很多采购第一时间想到粘胶。"（有明确指向） # ■ H2章节标题格式：必须用"一、二、三"，绝对禁止"第一章/第二章/第三章" # ■ 正文禁止套话废话：每段必须有具体信息（工厂名/具体数字/案例细节/操作步骤） # ■ 禁止"作为XXX，了解/掌握XXX，对于XXX至关重要/意义重大"类套话 article_html = "你的HTML内容（含[插图]占位符）" def gen_img_and_build_html(img_prompt_english: str, article_html: str, img_save_dir: str) -> dict: """图片生成与发布整合函数：生成图片→嵌入HTML→发布API→返回结构化结果""" # === 章节结构进化约束 === # 不得固定为4章，具体章数由内容深度决定： # - 规格解读/工艺揭秘型：建议4章 # - 避坑/认证合规型：建议3章 # - 行情分析/趋势预判型：建议5章 # 发布前验证 h2数量在3-5之间 os.makedirs(img_save_dir, exist_ok=True) b64 = None def _validate_jpeg(path: str, label: str) -> None: """下载后立即验证：文件>=10KB 且 JPEG 头为 FF D8 FF。失败则 raise 触发兜底。""" size = os.path.getsize(path) assert size >= 10000, f"{label}下载后{size}字节<10KB（错误页面/截断），当前任务中止！" with open(path, "rb") as f: header = f.read(3) assert header == b"\xff\xd8\xff", f"{label}文件头={header.hex()}不是JPEG，当前任务中止！" # 第一层：MiniMax #1 try: MINIMAX_KEY = "sk-cp-gvfuD8aTsLIzQ-wQb16s3022yGQWEN3RNsaIRq0J8LiszIHyee-KEye-ZRisw7kUpGfvMOxve62Q65PCUQoIwaQtNT_TtVkc1WAV9H2juMuzq5J6a_dfO_A" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx1.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#1失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#1") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx1_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _compressed_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _compressed_size >= 30000, f"MiniMax#1压缩后{_compressed_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"MiniMax#1 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" _mfile=os.path.expanduser("~/.hermes/cron/output/recent_gen_md5.txt"); _cm=hashlib.md5(open(compressed,"rb").read()).hexdigest(); _recent=set() if os.path.exists(_mfile) and(time.time()-os.path.getmtime(_mfile))<=7*86400: with open(_mfile) as _mf: for _l in _mf: _p=_l.strip().split(","); [None,None] if _p and _p[0]: _recent.add(_p[0]) if _cm in _recent: raise AssertionError(f"MiniMax#1生成的图片MD5={_cm}与近期图片重复，切换至下一层！") with open(_mfile,"a") as _mf: _mf.write(f"{_cm}\n") subprocess.run(["cp",compressed,f"{img_save_dir}/mx1__gen_{_cm}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第二层：MiniMax #2 if b64 is None: try: MINIMAX_KEY2 = "sk-cp-OBJYTXCbg4PQS6gO0Col8fT_cEgZY2Ur_6qhB-bWDAqiuFkciSntwIM0U26E-8HrqioqNRbcp8sgdCksRsQTmSoe-PnltkGuNbsE6xxDByKB-Yqr2nNfWNik" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_mx2.jpg" url = "https://api.minimax.chat/v1/image_generation" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "image-01", "prompt": prompt_english, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {MINIMAX_KEY2}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert result.get("base_resp", {}).get("status_code") == 0, f"MiniMax#2失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"]["image_urls"][0], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "MiniMax#2") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_mx2_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _mx2_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _mx2_comp_size >= 30000, f"MiniMax#2压缩后{_mx2_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"MiniMax#2 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" _mfile=os.path.expanduser("~/.hermes/cron/output/recent_gen_md5.txt"); _cm=hashlib.md5(open(compressed,"rb").read()).hexdigest(); _recent=set() if os.path.exists(_mfile) and(time.time()-os.path.getmtime(_mfile))<=7*86400: with open(_mfile) as _mf: for _l in _mf: _p=_l.strip().split(","); [None,None] if _p and _p[0]: _recent.add(_p[0]) if _cm in _recent: raise AssertionError(f"MiniMax#2生成的图片MD5={_cm}与近期图片重复，切换至下一层！") with open(_mfile,"a") as _mf: _mf.write(f"{_cm}\n") subprocess.run(["cp",compressed,f"{img_save_dir}/mx2__gen_{_cm}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第三层：智谱AI CogView-3 if b64 is None: try: ZHIPU_KEY = "a120ac2e2a824fdc8cb249fddf4dceef.ZRVoP3PHPRszh1Km" img_path = "/tmp/_gen_zp.png" url = "https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4/images/generations" payload = _json.dumps({"model": "cogview-3", "prompt": prompt_english, "n": 1, "aspect_ratio": "16:9"}).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {ZHIPU_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"智谱失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], img_path) _validate_jpeg(img_path, "智谱AI") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_zp_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", img_path, "-q:v", "3", "-vf", "scale=640:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _zp_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _zp_comp_size >= 30000, f"智谱AI压缩后{_zp_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"智谱AI base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" _mfile=os.path.expanduser("~/.hermes/cron/output/recent_gen_md5.txt"); _cm=hashlib.md5(open(compressed,"rb").read()).hexdigest(); _recent=set() if os.path.exists(_mfile) and(time.time()-os.path.getmtime(_mfile))<=7*86400: with open(_mfile) as _mf: for _l in _mf: _p=_l.strip().split(","); [None,None] if _p and _p[0]: _recent.add(_p[0]) if _cm in _recent: raise AssertionError(f"智谱AI生成的图片MD5={_cm}与近期图片重复，切换至下一层！") with open(_mfile,"a") as _mf: _mf.write(f"{_cm}\n") subprocess.run(["cp",compressed,f"{img_save_dir}/zp__gen_{_cm}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第四层：SiliconFlow Qwen if b64 is None: try: SF_KEY = "sk-..." url = "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1/images/generations" pl = {"model": "Tencent/T2I-ImgGen-Wenxin-v1", "prompt": prompt_english, "image_size": {"width": 1024, "height": 576}} data = _json.dumps(pl).encode() req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, headers={ "Authorization": f"Bearer {SF_KEY}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST") with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp: result = _json.loads(resp.read()) assert "data" in result and len(result["data"]) > 0, f"SiliconFlow失败: {result}" urllib.request.urlretrieve(result["data"][0]["url"], "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg") _validate_jpeg("/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "SiliconFlow") compressed = "/tmp/_gen_sf_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", "/tmp/_gen_sf.jpg", "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "压缩失败" _sf_comp_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _sf_comp_size >= 30000, f"SiliconFlow压缩后{_sf_comp_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"SiliconFlow base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" _mfile=os.path.expanduser("~/.hermes/cron/output/recent_gen_md5.txt"); _cm=hashlib.md5(open(compressed,"rb").read()).hexdigest(); _recent=set() if os.path.exists(_mfile) and(time.time()-os.path.getmtime(_mfile))<=7*86400: with open(_mfile) as _mf: for _l in _mf: _p=_l.strip().split(","); [None,None] if _p and _p[0]: _recent.add(_p[0]) if _cm in _recent: raise AssertionError(f"SiliconFlow生成的图片MD5={_cm}与近期图片重复，切换至下一层！") with open(_mfile,"a") as _mf: _mf.write(f"{_cm}\n") subprocess.run(["cp",compressed,f"{img_save_dir}/sf__gen_{_cm}.jpg"]) except Exception: b64 = None # 第五层：本地兜底 if b64 is None: LOCAL_IMG_DIR = "/home/tanqianku/.hermes/image_cache" USED_FILE = f"{LOCAL_IMG_DIR}/used_today.txt" today = datetime.date.today().isoformat() used_today = set() if os.path.exists(USED_FILE): with open(USED_FILE) as f: for line in f: parts = line.strip().split(',') if parts and parts[0] == today: used_today.add(parts[1]) import random candidates = [f for f in os.listdir(LOCAL_IMG_DIR) if f.endswith('.jpg') and os.path.getsize(os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, f)) < 150*1024] unused = [f for f in candidates if f not in used_today] if not unused: unused = candidates assert unused, "本地兜底图也没有，当前任务中止！" random.shuffle(unused); chosen = unused[0] src = os.path.join(LOCAL_IMG_DIR, chosen) compressed = "/tmp/_local_c.jpg" r = subprocess.run(["ffmpeg", "-i", src, "-q:v", "1", "-vf", "scale=720:-1", "-y", compressed], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60) assert r.returncode == 0 and os.path.getsize(compressed) < 150 * 1024, "兜底压缩失败" _validate_jpeg(compressed, "本地兜底") _local_compressed_size = os.path.getsize(compressed) assert _local_compressed_size >= 30000, f"本地兜底压缩后{_local_compressed_size}字节<30KB（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" b64 = base64.b64encode(open(compressed, "rb").read()).decode() assert len(b64) >= 30000, f"本地兜底 base64长度{len(b64)}<30000（图片数据不完整），当前任务中止！" with open(USED_FILE, "a") as f: f.write(f"{today},{chosen}\n") subprocess.run(["cp", compressed, f"{img_save_dir}/local_{chosen}"]) assert b64 is not None, "所有图片生成层均失败，当前任务中止！" img_tag = ( f'

' f'' f'

' ) assert '[插图]' in article_html, "HTML中没有[插图]占位符，当前任务中止！" html = article_html.replace('[插图]', img_tag) # 端到端验证：从最终HTML再次提取base64并确认长度（防止嵌入时损坏） _html_b64_match = _re.search(r']+src="data:image/jpeg;base64,([A-Za-z0-9+/=]{5000,})"', html) assert _html_b64_match, "HTML不含有效base64图片（提取失败），当前任务中止！" _html_b64_len = len(_html_b64_match.group(1)) assert _html_b64_len >= 30000, f"HTML提取base64长度{_html_b64_len}<30000（嵌入损坏），当前任务中止！" # 三项验证 assert '[插图' not in html, f"HTML含未替换[插图]，当前任务中止！" b64_imgs = _re.findall(r']+src="data:image/jpeg;base64,([A-Za-z0-9+/=]{5000,})"', html) assert len(b64_imgs) >= 1, "HTML不含有效base64图片，当前任务中止！" for b in b64_imgs: assert len(b) >= 5000, f"base64长度{len(b)}不足5000，图片数据不完整，当前任务中止！" raw_matches = _re.findall(r']*>([^<]*)]*>([^<]*)

', html) bad_inline = [(a, b) for a, b in raw_matches if a.strip() or b.strip()] assert not bad_inline, f"图片内嵌段落，当前任务中止！" # Payload体积校验：总content超过60KB时raise，避免平台存储占位符而非真内容 _total_len = len(html) assert _total_len <= 60000, f"HTML总长度{_total_len}超过60000字节限制，当前任务中止！（需压缩图片或减少字数）" # === 发布API（内嵌，LLM无法绕过） === _API_URL = "https://gw.tanqianku.com/_data_bus/v1/webhook/openclaw" _SECRET = "oc_tqk2026_P9xK$w7" _title_for_api = re.sub(r'[？！？]', '', _h1_m.group(1).strip()) if '_h1_m' in dir() else title _payload = json.dumps({ "title": _title_for_api, "content": final_html, "slug": slug, "category": category }, ensure_ascii=False).encode("utf-8") _ctx = ssl.create_default_context() _req = urllib.request.Request(_API_URL, data=_payload, headers={ "x-openclaw-secret": _SECRET, "Content-Type": "application/json; charset=utf-8" }, method="POST") _resp_data = json.loads(urllib.request.urlopen(_req, timeout=30, context=_ctx).read()) assert _resp_data.get("code") == 200, f"发布API返回错误: {_resp_data}" _article_id = _resp_data.get("data", {}).get("id") print(f"✅ 发布成功，article_id={_article_id}") return {"html": final_html, "article_id": _article_id} # === 调用图片生成+发布函数（内嵌API，LLM不可绕过）=== # === h1标签删除（必须在gen_img调用前执行，防止标题重复）=== _h1_m = re.search(r']*>(.*?)', article_html) assert _h1_m, "无法从HTML提取h1标题，当前任务中止！" _title_text = _h1_m.group(1).strip() _after_h1 = article_html.split('')[1] if '' in article_html else article_html _first_p_m = re.search(r']*>(.*?)

', _after_h1, re.DOTALL) _first_p_text = re.sub(r'<[^>]+>', '', _first_p_m.group(1)).strip() if _first_p_m else '' assert _first_p_text != _title_text, f"标题在正文开头重复：「{_title_text}」，当前任务中止！" # 检查文章第一段是否为标题（标题不得作为正文开头） _after_h1 = article_html.split('')[1] if '' in article_html else article_html _first_p_m = re.search(r']*>(.*?)

', _after_h1, re.DOTALL) _first_p_text = re.sub(r'<[^>]+>', '', _first_p_m.group(1)).strip() if _first_p_m else '' assert _first_p_text != _title_text, f"标题在正文开头重复：「{_title_text}」，当前任务中止！" article_html = re.sub(r']*>.*?\s*', '', article_html, flags=re.DOTALL) article_html = re.sub(r'```html[\s\S]*?```', '', article_html) article_html = re.sub(r'```[\s\S]*?```', '', article_html) assert '```' not in article_html, "清理后仍含代码围栏，当前任务中止！" _gen_result = gen_img_and_build_html(img_prompt_english, article_html, img_save_dir) # 解析返回值 assert isinstance(_gen_result, dict) and "html" in _gen_result, "gen_img_and_build_html未返回dict，函数可能被篡改！当前任务中止！" final_html = _gen_result["html"] article_id = _gen_result.get("article_id") assert article_id is not None, "article_id为None，发布失败！当前任务中止！" assert len(final_html) >= 20000, f"HTML长度{{len(final_html)}}<20000（图片未嵌入），当前任务中止！" , f"HTML长度{{len(final_html)}}<20000（图片未嵌入），当前任务中止！"

jobs.name: 每日系统巡检
jobs.prompt:
你是一个纺织内容发布系统的主管。

## 第一步：运行诊断
执行以下命令获取系统状态：
```
python3 /home/tanqianku/self_review.py 2>&1
```


【内容合规检查 - 提交前必须执行】
1. 标题不得作为正文第一段（标题是标题，第一段必须是引言/背景）
2. 文章第一段与标题完全相同 → 必须重写第一段
3. 违禁词检查：天猫/京东/拼多多/抖音/淘宝/阿里巴巴/亚马逊 → 替换为"电商平台"

## 第二步：根据诊断结果，立即执行修复

读取 jobs.json 和 self_review.py 的输出，发现以下任何问题必须立即修复（不需要用户确认）：

### 紧急（立即修复）
1. 兜底图 < 31张 → 从 output/images 复制并压缩到 image_cache
2. 有job缺少 gen_img_and_build_html 函数定义（伪完整prompt）→ 从任意有此函数的job提取代码段并注入
3. 有job的 MINIMAX_KEY 是 "sk-cp-...WNik" 占位符 → 从已配置的job获取真实Key并替换
4. 缺"标题不得作为正文开头"检查 → 注入检查代码

### 中等（自动修复+通知）
5. 叙事身份连续3篇相同 → 在prompt里强化轮换约束
6. 话题池枯竭 → 从trend文件或知识库提取新话题扩充

## 第三步：执行修复（用execute_code工具）

使用 execute_code 工具执行修复代码，不要只描述要修复，要真正执行。

## 第四步：发送简报
修复完成后，发送简短报告到 telegram home channel：
【每日巡检报告 - YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM】
系统状态：✅健康 / ⚠️需关注 / ❌异常
已修复：N项

jobs.name: GitHub自动备份
jobs.prompt:
备份HERMES_HOME关键文件到GitHub，运行备份脚本并推送。

执行步骤：
1. HERMES_HOME=/home/tanqianku/.hermes
2. cd $HERMES_HOME
3. 检查 git status --short | grep "^[M ]" | wc -l 如果为0则退出不推送
4. 如果有变更，运行 scripts/backup_to_github.sh "hourly auto backup $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')"
5. 报告推送到 telegram home channel（格式：✅ GitHub已同步 或 跳过（无变更））
